2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX 
22 - 24 May 2026 
  
 
From :  The FIA Formula 1 Technical Delegate  
To :  The Stewards Date :  22 May 2026 
  
 
Technical Delegate’s Report 
 
 
The following drivers will start the fifth Competition of the 2026 Formula One World 
Championship with a new internal combustion engine (ICE): 
 
Number Car Driver Previously used ICE 
    
06 Red Bull Racin g RB Ford Isack Had jar 2 
41 Racing Bulls RB Ford Arvid Lindblad 1 
30 Racing Bulls RB Ford Liam Lawson 1 
31 Haas Ferrari Esteban Ocon 1 
87 Haas Ferrari Oliver Bearman 1 
11 Cadillac Ferrari Ser
gio Perez 1 
77 Cadillac Ferrari Valtteri Bottas 1 
 
The internal combustion engine used by the above drivers is one (1) of the four (4) new internal 
combustion engines allowed for the 2026 Championship season and this is in conformity with 
B8.2.2 a) of the 2026 Formula One Sporting Regulations.
